{{Quote|You've been sent here to rescue them and secure Alluuvia, a new world they discovered.|[[Jameth Todkal]]|<ref name="OE" />}}
'''Alluuvia''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] that was located in the [[Elrood sector/Legends|Elrood sector]]. The [[Mining/Legends|mining]] on the planet conducted by [[Radell Mining Corporation]] was overseen by an ecologically-mindful [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]].

==Geography==
A scenic ocean world from orbit, the depths of the Alluuvian oceans were discovered to hold a valuable secret. Deep under the waters were dense pockets of metals and minerals of unknown worth. While the minerals made the waters toxic to off-worlders, they were discovered to be worth a great amount of [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]].<ref name="OE" />

==History==
When the planet was scouted out shortly after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] by an exploration team funded by [[Radell Mining Corporation]], claims on the world were disputed by the [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] gang known as [[the Scourge]]. Dispatching the [[Gray Griffins]] to follow up on exploration activities, the Radell employees were captured by the Scourge and held for ransom on the planet. Appealing to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] for help, the Rebel agents were dispatched an rescued the Gray Griffins.<ref name="OE" />

When further studies by the Radell Mining Corporation revealed that Alluuvia was also the homeworld of the [[Anguilla]], the Corporation began putting together a diplomatic team to meet with the natives. However, the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[Imperial Mining, Ltd.]] had discovered the worth of the world and sent a fleet of [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]] to invade the world, establishing a mining outpost on the planet. The native Anguilla were led by [[Anyar]] when they opposed the Imperial occupation. With the aid of Alliance operatives, the Anguilla were able to drive the Imperials from the world. Meeting with representatives with the Radell Mining Corporation, Anyar agreed to allow mining operations to commence, with the [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorian]] [[Iych-thae]] ensuring that environmental ramifications would be limited.<ref name="OE" />

==Appearances==
*[[Operation: Elrood (book)|''Operation: Elrood'']] {{1st}}
